summary: Backend Refactor & Explore Page Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 30/30 pytest tests passed testing all 8 route modules (auth, hive, collection, honeypot, trades, notifications, dms, explore). Frontend: All navigation and Explore page features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user with valid token
GET /api/feed - Returns posts from followed users
GET /api/explore/trending - Returns trending records with trending_spins count
GET /api/explore/recent-hauls - Returns haul posts with user info
GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors - Returns suggested users with shared_artists
Integration test - Login and access all protected routes
UI: Explore page loads with 'Explore' title and sub-copy
UI: Explore page shows 'Trending Records' section with horizontal scroll
UI: Trending records show album art, title, artist, and spin count
UI: Explore page shows 'Recent Hauls' section with user avatars and haul items
UI: Explore page shows search bar for collectors
UI: Search finds collectors by username (@trader found)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created, used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor complete: server.py split into 8 route modules under /app/backend/routes/ (auth.py, hive.py, collection.py, honeypot.py, trades.py, notifications.py, dms.py, explore.py). New explore endpoints: /api/explore/trending (most spun records in 14 days with trending_spins count), /api/explore/recent-hauls (NEW_HAUL posts with user info), /api/explore/suggested-collectors (users with shared_artists count based on collection overlap), /api/explore/active-isos (listings matching user's wantlist). All routes registered under /api prefix in server.py. database.py contains shared db, auth helpers, storage, Discogs, and notification utilities. models.py has all Pydantic models. ExplorePage.js shows 4 sections: Trending Records (horizontal scroll with album art and spin count), Recent Hauls, Suggested Collectors, and Wantlist Matches (if data exists).

components: 'Explore' title with sub-copy 'discover what the community is into.'
Trending Records horizontal scroll with album art, title, artist, spin count
Recent Hauls section with user avatars and haul item previews
Wantlist Matches section (if user has ISOs)
data-testid attributes: explore-page, trending-section, recent-hauls-section, explore-search
endpoints: GET /api/explore/recent-hauls - user info attached to posts
